flashcards.definition: u × v; a vector perpendicular to both u and v (3D only).
u × v = −(v × u); reversing the order negates the result.
= |u||v| sin θ; the area of the parallelogram formed by u and v.
Curl fingers from u toward v; thumb points in direction of u × v.
u × v = 0⃗ iff u ∥ v (since sin 0° = 0).
